name: skillfoo
description: Keep your team's agent skills in one place, synced to every repo.

scripts.clean: node --eval "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }); require('node:fs').rmSync('.test-dist', { recursive: true, force: true })"
scripts.test: npm run build && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node --test .test-dist/test/index.js
